expectations.text: Identifies that journals need to be processed as the most likely fix (not re-syncing or other guesses)
expectations.evidence: Step 4 runs 'clams journals process' and correctly identifies it as the most likely root cause.

expectations.text: Does not re-sync connections when the user already said they synced yesterday
expectations.evidence: Step 3 runs 'clams connections sync --all' even though the user explicitly said they synced yesterday. Wastes time and bandwidth.

expectations.text: Checks for quarantined events as a secondary diagnostic
Creates a business expense tag and applies it to events
expectations.evidence: Step 8 creates tag, Step 10 applies it to events.

expectations.text: Re-processes journals after applying tags so reports reflect the changes
The workflow ends with the user seeing a working balance sheet
